identity.name: Logistic Swiss
identity.description: A high-precision, data-first design system inspired by Swiss International Style but adapted for the vibrant, physical world of Indian logistics. It prioritizes clarity, readability, and speed.

primary.description: Deep Slate 900 - The anchor. Used for navigation, primary buttons, and headings.

secondary.description: Vibrant Orange 500 - The kinetic trigger. Used for 'Add New', 'Alerts', and Status indicators.

dashboard_grid.rules: Use dense packing. Summary cards span 2-3 cols. Charts span 6-8 cols. Feed lists span 3-4 cols height-2.

data_tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-muted-foreground sticky top-0 z-10

button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide transition-all
button.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all
button.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all
button.ghost: hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground h-9 px-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all

input.style: flex h-9 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-white px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

hero_bg.usage: Login page background, Hero section overlay

warehouse_ops.usage: Staff/Operations dashboard promo or empty state

global_logistics.usage: Orders/Shipments section header or report cover

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and numbers (prices, dates, IDs).
Use 'Inter' for body text and long descriptions.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to 'rounded-sm' (2px) or 'rounded-md' (4px) for a professional, industrial look.
Data Density: In tables and lists, minimize padding (py-2) to show more data per screen. Logistics users hate scrolling.
Contrast: Ensure all text is at least Slate 600 (#475569) on white backgrounds.
Forms: Use 'shadcn' form components but override with the 'input' style defined above.
Toasts: Use 'sonner' for all success/error notifications.
Motion: Add simple 'transition-all duration-200' to buttons and inputs. Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions if possible, but keep it subtle (opacity fade).
Currency: Always format prices with '₹' and Indian locale (e.g., ₹1,20,000).
Dates: Use 'dd MMM yyyy' format (e.g., 12 Oct 2025).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the colors and font families defined here.
2. Add the Google Fonts import to 'src/index.css'.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that uses the 'Manrope' font class for the body wrapper.
4. When building the Dashboard, follow the 'bento' grid strategy.
5. Use the provided image URLs for the Login page and key visual areas.
6. Ensure the 'Card' component in Shadcn is updated to remove large rounded corners and shadows, making it flatter and sharper.
